overall.description: A static shot of a dimly lit gothic classroom or great hall from a video game, with students seated at wooden desks. The atmospheric scene features stone walls, tall arched windows, and misty lighting. Two characters in dark robes walk through the hall at different times, while the camera remains stationary throughout.

entered.detail: tall stone walls with gothic architectural details and columns

large decorative arched doorway at the far end of the hall

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, elevated perspective of a dimly lit gothic classroom where the atmospheric stillness is punctuated by the passage of mysterious figures. It begins with a wide view of students seated at wooden desks amidst stone walls and tall arched windows shrouded in a heavy mist. As the scene lingers in this moody environment, a character clad in dark robes emerges from the left and crosses through the foreground toward the center. The stillness then returns briefly before another robed figure enters from the left, walking steadily away from the camera toward a distant archway at the back of the hall.
